description:
It's been a long, difficult game with lots of fighting. Though you seem to have gotten the upper hand, Black hasn't given up. Now, an opportunity presents itself to you. Make Black resign!
Note: There are a lot of variations. Please tell me if I missed any (which is likely)
Edit: White center group now has one less liberty for simplification. Variations also added for a previously off path move.
